meta.name: Limnalis conformance corpus
meta.purpose: Golden-bundle corpus for parser, normalizer, evaluator, and conformance testing before schema freeze.
phase_order: resolve active frame and evaluator panel
initialize or reuse session baseline service
evaluate adequacy assessments and joint adequacy groups
aggregate claim results under the resolution policy
fold blocks per evaluator, then aggregate block results

priority_order.members: optional; if present must equal same set as order

validation.score_present: treated as an attested output of method
validation.score_omitted: allowed; method must be executable and compute the score

validation.keys: must match effective evaluator panel after any transport override

fixtures.behavior: Uses the reference-evaluator default declaration semantics for DeclarationExpr, including within FramePattern matching.
Returns T for baseline comparison predicates when the referenced baseline resolves successfully.
Returns T for all world predicates in A6. Isolates licensing semantics from truth.
Domain fixture for B1. overload(line_B)=T; causal c2=B[source_conflict]; c3=T.
Domain fixture for B2. Returns T for c1-c4. Support is determined by the declared evidence policy.
Criterion binding for B2.c3. Returns T under the fixture.

details: conflicted if any relevant conflicts relation is present
otherwise partial if any relevant evidence has completeness < 1 or internal_conflict > 0

fixtures.behavior: No transportClaim handler. Truth requests return metadata_only / transport_missing as appropriate.
Trivial transportClaim handler. Preserves truth and provenance when transport preconditions are met.
Transport handler implementing degrade mode with the default degradation rules.
Transport handler implementing remap_recompute. Remaps source claim to destination frame and re-evaluates.
Scalar 10.
Tracked trajectory [9,10,11] over the active time index.
Reactive-margin zero reference used in B1.
Returns F for all predicates under the adversarial evaluator fixture.
Returns N[missing_evidence] for p.
Returns T for p.
Returns F for p.

rules: if primary.truth = T and adversarial.truth = F, return {truth=B, reason=evaluator_conflict, support=conflicted}
if all listed member truths agree, return the agreed truth
when truths agree, merge support conservatively: conflicted > partial > supported > inapplicable > absent
provenance is the union of member provenances plus the adjudication binding
behavior.block_rule: for block aggregation, the binding receives synthetic EvalNodes with truth = evaluator-local block truth, support = inapplicable, and provenance containing evaluator id + block id

fixtures.behavior: Executable adequacy method. Recomputes score to 0.88, disagreeing with a declared 0.95 beyond tolerance.
Executable adequacy method. Computes score = 0.92.
Two-stage JudgedExpr criterion. Receives innerTruth=T and returns T under fixture.

cases.name: Resolved shorthand frame
normalized_ast_expectations: frame resolver completes bundle frame to full FrameNode before direct evaluation

cases.name: Unresolved shorthand frame
normalized_ast_expectations: no full FrameNode available for direct evaluation

cases.name: Logical composition and block folding
normalized_ast_expectations: b, n, p in expression position -> zero-arity PredicateExprNode

cases.name: Baseline modes
normalized_ast_expectations: b_invalid is syntactically valid but semantically invalid

cases.name: Evidence conflict vs partial support
normalized_ast_expectations: claim refs resolve to EvidenceNode ids

cases.name: Individual and joint adequacy
normalized_ast_expectations: JointAdequacy exact-set matching uses claim-local usesAnchors set

cases.name: Bridge transport: metadata_only vs preserve
Multi-evaluator conflict
Priority-order resolution
Transport truth modes
normalized_ast_expectations: Three BridgeNodes with distinct TransportNode.mode values

cases.name: Session-based baseline timing
normalized_ast_expectations: EvaluationRequest uses one session with two steps
fixed baseline cache is session-scoped; on_reference resolves per step

cases.name: Adequacy method conflict and circularity
normalized_ast_expectations: AdequacyAssessmentNode.score is optional; aa2 exercises method-computed score path
basis [c_dependent] creates a circular adequacy dependency for a_circular

cases.name: Core JudgedExpr
Adjudicated resolution
normalized_ast_expectations: Claim and block aggregation both route through adjudication binding

cases.name: Grid contingency bundle
normalized_ast_expectations: a_nminus1 adequacy entries -> AdequacyAssessmentNode with producer

cases.name: JWT access / adequacy bundle
normalized_ast_expectations: adequacy entries -> AdequacyAssessmentNode with explicit producer
